parameters.query: SELECT l.id, l.name, l.email, l.company, l.status, ol.followup_count, ol.replied, ol.last_followup_at FROM leads l JOIN outreach_logs ol ON l.id = ol.lead_id WHERE l.status = 'contacted' AND ol.replied = false AND ol.followup_count < 3 AND (ol.last_followup_at IS NULL OR ol.last_followup_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '2 days') ORDER BY ol.followup_count ASC;
INSERT INTO outreach_logs (lead_id, email_subject, email_body, status, followup_count) VALUES (:leadId, :subject, :body, 'pending', :count) RETURNING id;

nodes.name: Log-First: Pending
nodes.notes: Transactional integrity: Record intent before execution.

parameters.query: SELECT status FROM service_health WHERE service_name = 'gmail';
UPDATE outreach_logs SET status = 'sent', sent_at = NOW() WHERE id = :logId;
UPDATE outreach_logs SET status = 'failed' WHERE id = :logId;
UPDATE leads SET followup_attempts = followup_attempts + 1, status = CASE WHEN :count >= 2 THEN 'no_response' ELSE status END WHERE id = :leadId;
parameters.queryParameters: leadId={{$node["Generate Follow-up Content"].json.lead_id}}, count={{$node["Generate Follow-up Content"].json.followup_count}}

nodes.name: Update Lead Stats
nodes.notes: Updates attempt count and sets status to no_response if max reached.
